sections.title: If the player has opted out of Adventure Paths

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: You are currently not participating in Adventure Paths. Would you like to join back in?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: If the player is not eligible for Adventure Paths

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: I am simply an adventurer like yourself taking a break on my journey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wish you luck on your next adventure.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: And I to you.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Hello [player name], what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are Adventure Paths?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: A long time ago, I was a newbie just like you who didn't know what to do and I would be more than happy to pass on my experience.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: I've created some Adventure Paths which I recommend you to start off with. An Adventure Path is a list of tasks which you can complete in any order.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: To help you get started on your Adventure Path, I'll also give you a starter kit with some useful items.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Once you've completed an Adventure Path task, come back to me and I'll give you a reward.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any Adventure Path starter kits for me?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Here are all of the starter kits you have left to claim.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: You seem to have already claimed all of your starter kits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to claim my Adventure Path rewards.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: I have no rewards to give you at the moment.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: I have no rewards to give you at the moment. But I do have some members rewards left to give you, visit me on a members world to receive them.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: You should make sure you have space before asking for rewards.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: That is the last of the rewards you have currently earned. But I do have some members rewards left to give you, visit me on a members world to receive them.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: That is the last of your rewards which you have earned.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: I can't give you any more rewards until you come back with more inventory space.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me some Adventure Paths?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Of course, here you go.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Hey [player name]! Come over here.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: You look new around here, welcome to the world of Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, it's my first time here and I'm not sure where to start.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Well, lucky for you, that is exactly why I am here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are Adventure Paths?

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: A long time ago, I was a newbie just like you who didn't know what to do and I would be more than happy to pass on my experience.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: I've created some Adventure Paths which I recommend you to start off with. An Adventure Path is a list of tasks which you can complete in any order.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: To help you get started on your Adventure Path, I'll also give you a starter kit with some useful items.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Once you've completed an Adventure Path task, come back to me and I'll give you a reward.

lines.speaker: Adventurer Jon
lines.text: Start by opening your quest panel and then selecting the flashing yellow star.
